daily_take.headline: Royals Collapse 17 Points. Sharp Money Knows Something About Detroit.
daily_take.deck: Kansas City tanked from 44.5% to 27.5% in 24 hours on $917K volume, signaling coordinated smart money moving into the Tigers. The drop is too violent and too liquid to be noise. Either the market is panicking on injury news or line movement before public information hits. Check the Tigers lineup before you fade it. A 17-point swing on a baseball game this close to tipoff doesn't happen without reason.
